description_long: This picnic table features a rectangular wooden tabletop with a rich, dark brown finish, supported by a robust metal frame. The tabletop surface is smooth and displays visible wood grain patterns, adding a natural aesthetic. The supporting structure consists of two wide, angled metal legs on each end, connected by a horizontal and diagonal crossbar for added stability. The legs are painted in a matte gray color, contrasting with the warm wood tone of the tabletop. There are no attached benches, making this table suitable for use with separate seating. The overall design is modern and sturdy, ideal for outdoor urban environments.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden picnic table with a dark brown tabletop and gray metal cross-braced legs, designed for outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden tabletop and the angled metal legs with cross-bracing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the tabletop and the thickness of the wooden surface, with the metal legs visible at each end.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the tabletop and the supporting metal frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the length and depth of the tabletop and the sturdy metal legs.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by two wide, angled metal legs at each end, connected by a horizontal and diagonal crossbar for enhanced stability.
